NOAIS v0.5 fixture: YouTube comment thread

This page mimics the YouTube comment DOM. NOAIS will scan each ytd-comment-renderer and append a badge.

@fan_001
first!
@curious_mind
It is important to note that the new model demonstrates a significant improvement over its predecessor. Furthermore, the architecture leverages a novel attention mechanism that allows for greater contextual understanding. Additionally, the training process incorporates a comprehensive dataset. In conclusion, these advancements represent a substantial leap forward in the field of natural language processing.
@real_human_42
Ok I just bought this and unboxed it last night. The build quality is honestly way better than I expected for the price — the buttons have a nice click, the screen is bright, and the battery is still at 80% after a full day of messing with it. Two complaints: the included cable is super short, and the app keeps nagging me to sign in. Otherwise, no regrets.
@ai_assistant_clone
As an AI language model, I do not have personal experiences, but I can provide a comprehensive overview of the topic. It is important to note that the subject matter has been extensively studied, and numerous sources highlight the key considerations. Furthermore, the underlying principles can be broken down into three primary categories. Additionally, the implications of these principles extend across a wide range of applications.
